description_long: This object is a rectangular, industrial-style radio receiver with a weathered, metallic exterior. The front face features a set of five vertical sliders, two large circular dials, and a rectangular display screen, all set into a corroded metal surface. The top and sides are reinforced with embossed X-shaped patterns, suggesting durability and ruggedness, while the back is plain with a recessed panel. The metal casing is mottled with rust and dark stains, giving it a utilitarian, aged appearance. The controls and display are all flush with the surface, and there are no visible antennas or branding. The overall design is robust, functional, and suited for harsh urban or industrial environments.
description: A rugged, rectangular metal radio receiver with sliders, dials, and a display set into a weathered, rusted surface. The front is detailed with controls, while the rest of the body is reinforced and plain.
description_view_0: The end face shows a solid metal panel with an embossed X pattern and no controls or openings.
description_view_1: The front face displays five sliders, two large dials, and a rectangular display screen, all set into a corroded metal surface.
description_view_2: The opposite end mirrors the first, with a solid metal panel and an embossed X pattern.
description_view_3: The back face is plain, featuring a large recessed rectangular panel with no visible controls or openings.
